notes: The observability milestone features (dashboard API, metrics, alerts, structured JSON, OpenTelemetry, event schema, audit trail, Langfuse export, trace waterfall, correlation IDs, cost tracking, operator intervention) do not define any 'fulfills' assertions in the validation contract. The validation contract contains 55 assertions across areas: CLI, Daemon, Orchestrator, Agents, Tools, LLM, Validation, State, Memory, Skills, Safety, Cross-Area, and Research. All 55 assertions were already validated as 'passed' in prior milestone user-testing validations (cli, daemon-fix, agents-fix, llm, state, skills, research, workspace-modernization, orchestration-fix, autonomy, benchmark, prompts, git, git-fix). The observability milestone builds upon these foundational systems with internal observability concerns (metrics, tracing, audit) that are tested via scrutiny validators rather than user-facing assertions.
